prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为约23881→28191→27162→28051→36813，整体呈波动后移趋势，尤其2025年较2024年后移约8762名，降幅显著；2025年基准位次 约36813名；该校在福建省物理类招生计划2021–2022年均为30人，2023年28人，2024年33人，2025年增至39人；2026年计划仍为39人，与2025年持平，未 出现扩招或缩招，对竞争格局无直接冲击。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 青海大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜排名近年约第173–198名，2026年未进入前200名，整体排名偏后且 呈波动下滑趋势，学校层次对高分考生吸引力有限；该校在声誉舆情文件中无显著记录，未出现正面或负面舆情事件；抖音综合热度排名第106位，评价为“一般 ”，短视频平台曝光量较低，报考关注度不高；第五轮学科评估中青海大学无A–/A/A+等级学科，优势学科不突出，对考生报考的额外吸引力较弱。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 青海大学位于青海省西宁市，距福建省较远，地域偏好上不占优势；该校在福建省招生人数占比较小，2025年 物理类计划39人，属跨省招生中的中等规模；计算机类、电气工程及其自动化、临床医学等社会热门专业该校均有开设，但学科评估等级不高；福建省物理类考生2021年约11.7万人，2025年增至约19.2万人，2026 年总考生约26.79万人，按近年物理类占比约76%估算，2026年物理类考生约20.4万人，较2025年增加约6.1%，考生规模扩大将加剧竞争。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅后移的走势、2026年招生计划持平、福建省物理类考生明显增加（约+6.1%）、学校排名偏后 且声誉热度平淡等因素，预计2026年竞争将进一步加剧，位次在2025年基准36813名基础上继续小幅后移。预测最低位次约37013名，区间36513–37513名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for the Physics Category were approximately 23881 → 28191 → 27162 → 28051 → 36813, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend, especially in 2025, which shifted back by about 8762 places compared to 2024, a significant decline; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 36813; the university's enrollment plan for the Physics Category in Fujian Province was 30 students from 2021 to 2022, 28 in 2023, 33 in 2024, and increased to 39 in 2025; the 2026 plan remains at 39 students, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or reduction, having no direct impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Qinghai University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; its main ranking on the Soft Science Ranking has been around 173–198 in recent years, and it did not enter the top 200 in 2026, with an overall low ranking and a fluctuating downward trend, limiting its appeal to high-scoring candidates; the university has no significant records in reputation and public opinion files, with no positive or negative public opinion events; its comprehensive popularity ranking on Douyin is 106th, rated as 'average', with low exposure on short video platforms and low application attention; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Qinghai University has no A–/A/A+ level disciplines, with no outstanding advantageous disciplines, providing weak additional appeal to candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Qinghai University is located in Xining City, Qinghai Province, far from Fujian Province, with no advantage in regional preference; the number of students enrolled in Fujian Province is relatively small, with 39 students planned for the Physics Category in 2025, a medium scale among cross-provincial enrollments; the university offers socially popular majors such as Computer Science, Electrical Engineering and Automation, and Clinical Medicine, but their discipline evaluation levels are not high; the number of Physics Category candidates in Fujian Province was about 117,000 in 2021, increased to about 192,000 in 2025, and the total number of candidates in 2026 is about 267,900. Estimating based on the recent Physics Category proportion of about 76%, the number of Physics Category candidates in 2026 is about 204,000, an increase of about 6.1% compared to 2025, and the expansion of the candidate pool will intensify competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant backward trend in rankings in 2025, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, the notable increase in Physics Category candidates in Fujian Province (approximately +6.1%), the university's low ranking and mediocre reputation and popularity, it is expected that competition will further intensify in 2026, with rankings continuing to shift slightly backward from the 2025 baseline of 36813. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 37013, with a range of 36513–37513.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 36513–37513, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction for application, with Tier 1 majors as a sprint choice (such as Computer Science and Electrical Engineering), and Tier 3 majors for safety. Since the university has no A-class advantageous disciplines, priority should be given to socially popular majors with broad employment prospects, such as engineering and economics/management majors.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 青海大学医学类在福建省2021年至2025年最低录取位次分别为23881名、26324名、25090名、28051名、36813名，整体呈波动上升趋势，尤其2024至2025年从28051名跃升至36813 名，增幅显著。招生计划方面，2021至2023年稳定在6人，2024年扩至9人，2025年回调至7人，而2026年计划进一步缩减至仅3人（药学、中医学、预防医学各1人），缩招幅度约5 7%。计划大幅缩减将加剧竞争，推动位次上行。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 青海大学是国家211工程重点建设高校，入选双一流建设高校，虽非985院校，但在西部地区综合实力较强，医学学科是其传统优势方向之一，对中分段考生具有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 医学类专业历来是高考报考热门方向，预防医学、中医学等专业社会认可度高、就业前景稳定，福建省考生对省外211医学院校的报考意愿持续较强。青海大学地处西北，地理位 置相对偏远，一定程度上影响高分考生选择，但211身份和医学类专业热度仍能吸引中等位次考生。2026年福建省医学类招生规模整体平稳，未出现大幅波动。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合供需弹性模型与历年趋势，预测2026年青海大学医学类在福建省最低录取位次约为26590名，对应位次区间为26090至27090名。相比2025年位次有所回升（位次数字减小，更 易进入），主要因招生计划大幅缩减后M3模型反映的供需调整效应，但医学热度持续使位次不会降至2021年水平。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum admission rankings for Qinghai University's medical category in Fujian Province from 2021 to 2025 were 23881, 26324, 25090, 28051, and 36813 respectively, showing a fluctuating upward trend, especially from 2024 to 2025, where it jumped from 28051 to 36813, a significant increase. In terms of enrollment plan, it remained stable at 6 from 2021 to 2023, expanded to 9 in 2024, decreased to 7 in 2025, and further reduced to only 3 in 2026 (1 each for Pharmacy, Traditional Chinese Medicine, and Preventive Medicine), a reduction of about 57%. The significant reduction in plan will intensify competition and push the ranking upward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Qinghai University is a national key university under the 211 Project and selected as a Double First-Class construction university. Although not a 985 university, it has strong comprehensive strength in the western region, and its medical discipline is one of its traditional advantageous directions, attracting mid-range candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Medical majors have always been a popular direction in college entrance examinations. Majors like Preventive Medicine and Traditional Chinese Medicine have high social recognition and stable employment prospects. Candidates from Fujian Province have a consistently strong willingness to apply for 211 medical schools outside the province. Qinghai University is located in the northwest, relatively remote, which to some extent affects high-scoring candidates' choices, but its 211 status and the popularity of medical majors still attract mid-range candidates. In 2026, the overall scale of medical enrollment in Fujian Province is stable, with no significant fluctuations.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the supply-demand elasticity model and historical trends, the predicted minimum admission ranking for Qinghai University's medical category in Fujian Province in 2026 is approximately 26590, with a ranking range of 26090 to 27090. Compared to 2025, the ranking will rebound (smaller ranking number, easier to enter), mainly due to the supply-demand adjustment effect reflected by the M3 model after the significant reduction in enrollment plan, but the sustained popularity of medicine will prevent the ranking from dropping to the 2021 level.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
(No lower-threshold majors enrolled in 2026)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors such as Traditional Chinese Medicine and Pharmacy, with Tier 1 Preventive Medicine as a reach goal. Since only three majors are enrolled in 2026, each with only 1 spot, competition is fierce. Candidates are advised to reasonably assess their rankings and prepare a backup plan.
